hero.sub: Automate shelf audits with mobile capture. Instant detection of planogram violations and centralized execution management across all stores.
hero.feat3: OCR price tag reading & anomaly detection

problem.label: The Challenge
problem.title: Shelf Execution is Broken
problem.sub: Retailers lose 3-8% of revenue annually to poor shelf execution. Manual audits, inconsistent data, and reactive fixes are no longer enough.

items.title: Manual Audits
items.desc: Store visits consume significant time and labor, taking staff away from customer-facing activities.

items.title: Inconsistent Reporting
items.desc: Different teams and regions collect different data, leading to fragmented and unreliable compliance metrics.

items.title: Limited Visibility
items.desc: Headquarters lacks real-time insights into shelf conditions, causing delayed responses to out-of-stocks.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.sub: An automated, end-to-end process for retail execution.

steps.title: Store Photo
steps.desc: Staff capture images via mobile app or fixed cameras.

steps.title: AI Analysis
steps.desc: System processes images using computer vision.

steps.title: Corrective Action
steps.desc: Automated alerts trigger staff restock tasks.

modules.label: Platform Modules
modules.title: Everything you need for shelf intelligence
modules.sub: Six integrated modules that work standalone or together.

items.title: AI Shelf Recognition
items.desc: Identify any SKU from a shelf image with 99%+ accuracy. Handles thousands of products across categories in real time.

items.title: Mobile Capture App
items.desc: Empower store staff with an intuitive mobile app to capture shelf images quickly, with built-in quality checks.

items.title: Compliance Monitoring
items.desc: Compare actual shelf state against master planograms pixel-by-pixel. Auto-generate deviation reports and corrective work orders.

items.title: Reporting & Analytics
items.desc: Multi-dimensional shelf performance analytics across stores, regions, and national levels. Automated executive-grade reports.

items.title: API Integration
items.desc: RESTful APIs, Webhooks, and native connectors for major ERP systems. SDKs in Python, Node.js, and Java.

industries.label: Industries
industries.title: Purpose-built for every retail format
industries.sub: From convenience stores to FMCG giants — ISA adapts to your category.

security.label: Security & Compliance
security.title: Enterprise-grade security
security.sub: SOC2 Type II certified. ISO 27001 certified. On-premise available.

items.title: Role-based Access Control
items.desc: Granular permissions for head office, regional managers, and store staff.

items.title: Encrypted Data Transmission
items.desc: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry standards.

items.title: Audit Logs
items.desc: Comprehensive logging of all system actions for compliance and tracking.

items.title: Secure Cloud Infrastructure
items.desc: Hosted on certified, high-availability enterprise cloud environments.

items.title: SSO Support
items.desc: Seamless integration with your existing identity providers (SAML/OIDC).

items.q: How accurate is the shelf recognition AI?
items.a: Our AI achieves 99%+ SKU recognition accuracy across 50,000+ products, tested across varied lighting and angles.

items.q: Does it work with our existing ERP?
items.a: Yes. We have native connectors for SAP, Oracle, and major retail management systems. Custom integrations are also supported.
All plans include a 30-day free trial, no credit card required.
Cloud, on-premise, and hybrid configurations are available. Enterprise plans support private cloud and custom data residency.

cta.label: Get Started
cta.title: Shelf Intelligence,
cta.sub: See a live demo tailored to your retail format. Our engineers walk you through real data in 30 minutes — no slides, no fluff.

support.faq1a: Planogram compliance measures whether actual shelf conditions match the master planogram designed by HQ. ISA's AI automatically compares shelf images against registered planograms.
support.faq2q: How do I connect the API?
support.faq2a: ISA provides REST API and Webhooks with OpenAPI spec and SDKs for Python/Node.js/Java. See sample code in the documentation.
support.faq3a: Enterprise plans support on-premise, private cloud, and hybrid configurations with Japan domestic data storage.
support.faq4a: Mon-Fri 9:00-18:00 JST for Japanese and English support. Enterprise plans include 24/7 support.
support.faq5q: How do I integrate with our existing ERP?
support.faq5a: We have native connectors for SAP, Oracle, and major retail management systems. Custom integrations are supported.

platform.label: Platform
platform.title: Six modules,
platform.sub: Use individually or combined. The more you integrate, the deeper intelligence you get.
platform.ctaSub: We prepare demos tailored to your format and scale. Contact us today.

tabs.label: Shelf Recognition
tabs.title: AI Shelf Recognition Engine
tabs.desc: 99%+ product identification accuracy using deep learning. Supports 50,000+ SKUs. Stable recognition regardless of lighting conditions or camera angles.

tabs.label: Compliance
tabs.title: Planogram Compliance Engine
tabs.desc: Pixel-level comparison of actual shelves against master planograms. Automatically detects facings, misplaced items, and OOS, generating corrective work orders.

tabs.label: OCR Price
tabs.title: OCR & Price Intelligence
tabs.desc: Automatic price tag reading using high-precision OCR. Automates price anomaly detection, competitor price comparison, and promo compliance checks.

tabs.label: Analytics
tabs.title: Analytics & Reporting
tabs.desc: Multi-dimensional shelf performance analysis from store to national level. Automated executive dashboard delivery and scheduled reports.

tabs.label: API Integration
tabs.title: API & Integration Platform
tabs.desc: Fully OpenAPI compliant REST API, Webhooks, and ERP connectors. Same-day integration possible with Python/Node.js/Java SDKs.

tabs.label: Auto Generation
tabs.title: Auto Planogram Generation AI
tabs.desc: AI automatically designs optimal shelf layouts based on sales velocity, category strategy, and space constraints. Reduces weeks of work to minutes.

company.title: AI Shelf Intelligence by
company.sub: As a Panasonic Connect solution, we accelerate digital transformation in retail and FMCG.
company.mission1: Bring AI-powered shelf visibility and automation — once only available to the largest enterprises — to every retailer and FMCG brand regardless of size.
company.mission2: ISA is built on Panasonic Connect's deep expertise in edge computing, computer vision, and enterprise solutions — combining operational practicality with enterprise-grade reliability.
company.certSub: Security is not an option — it is the foundation. We maintain the highest-level certifications.
company.ctaSub: We'll reply within 1 business day. Contact us anytime.

timeline.d: Launched as an internal retail AI research project at Panasonic Connect.
PoC with three major supermarket chains in Japan; 97% recognition accuracy.
Starter and Professional plans launched with initial rollout to 50 stores.
On-premise and hybrid options added; SAP/Oracle connectors released.
Planogram generation module released to accelerate national rollouts.

missionCards.d: Proven enterprise DX delivery across manufacturing and retail.
Continuous investment in AI and computer vision research.
Integrations with major ERP vendors and retail technology partners.
